channel.title: Cassidy Harman
channel.description: Quiet travel and food journal updates from Cassidy Harman.

item.title: Six Ways to (Legally) Work Anywhere
item.description: Temporary work, paperwork, and practical ways to stay on the right side of local rules while moving often.

item.title: Highlights from Mali
item.description: A lift to Bamako, a slow arrival, and a week that made Western Africa feel even more generous than expected.

item.title: Desert Etiquette
item.description: The simple code that keeps desert travelers safe, starting with the rule that your water is everyone's water.

item.title: The Loudest City in the World
item.description: A softer way to move through Cairo when the city is full of life, music, engines, and impossible volume.

item.title: Cheap and Delicious Eats in Istanbul
item.description: The best food is rarely inside the fanciest hotels. Follow the locals and the meals become better and kinder to your budget.
